CREATE TABLE decrypt_test (dt DateTime, user_id UInt32, encrypted String, iv String) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO decrypt_test VALUES ('2022-08-02 00:00:00', 1, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'value1', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey01', 'iv1'), 'iv1'), ('2022-08-02 00:00:01', 2, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'value2', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey02', 'iv2'), 'iv2'), ('2022-08-02 00:00:02', 3, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'value3', 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey03', 'iv3'), 'iv3');
SELECT dt, user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeyinvalid', iv) AS decrypted_value FROM decrypt_test ORDER BY user_id ASC;
SELECT dt, user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey01', iv) AS decrypted_value FROM decrypt_test WHERE user_id = 1;
SELECT dt, user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey01', iv) AS decrypted_value FROM decrypt_test WHERE dt < '2022-09-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY user_id DESC;
CREATE TABLE second_decrypt_test (dt DateTime, user_id UInt32, encrypted String, iv String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO second_decrypt_test SELECT dt, user_id, encrypt('aes-256-gcm', 'nested_value_' || toString(user_id), 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey01', iv) AS encrypted, iv FROM decrypt_test;

SELECT s.dt, s.user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', s.encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey01', s.iv) AS decrypted_value FROM second_decrypt_test s INNER JOIN decrypt_test d ON s.user_id = d.user_id WHERE d.dt < '2022-09-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY s.user_id ASC;

WITH (SELECT AVG(user_id) FROM decrypt_test) AS avg_user_id SELECT dt, user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykey03', iv) AS decrypted_value FROM decrypt_test WHERE user_id > avg_user_id;
SELECT user_id, tryDecrypt('aes-256-gcm', encrypted, 'keykeykeykeykeykeykeykeykeyinvalid', iv) AS decrypted_value FROM decrypt_test GROUP BY user_id;
